Arcade Skill
中文 English Français Italiano العربية

Old-school arcade breaks for coding agents.

When Claude Code, Codex, or another agent is busy compiling, testing, or generating a diff, Arcade Skill opens a tiny nostalgic browser game: local URL, verified bundle, pixel platforms, one more run.

GitHub repo View manifest Project intro

Geeky by design

Manifest fetch, sha256 verification, local cache, and a tiny Python launcher.

Nostalgic on purpose

Flash-era and feature-phone energy: short runs, harsh misses, instant retries.

Hot updated

New games, sponsor links, ads switches, and kill switches ship through JSON.
